section-header.name: SectionHeader
section-header.purpose: Opens a section with title, subject, objective, and level indicators
section-header.teacher_description: Sets the title, subject, and learning objectives for a section.

hook-hero.name: HookHero
hook-hero.purpose: Creates felt need before explanation arrives
hook-hero.teacher_description: Grabs attention with a question, quote, or fact before the lesson begins.
hook-hero.print_fallback: Pull quote block with left border

explanation-block.name: ExplanationBlock
explanation-block.purpose: Sustained prose that builds a mental model
explanation-block.teacher_description: Main teaching prose that builds understanding step by step.

prerequisite-strip.name: PrerequisiteStrip
prerequisite-strip.purpose: Lists assumed knowledge with optional refresher pop-ups
prerequisite-strip.teacher_description: Lists assumed knowledge with optional refresher notes.

what-next-bridge.name: WhatNextBridge
what-next-bridge.purpose: Connects the section forward to what the concept enables
what-next-bridge.teacher_description: Connects this section to the concept or topic that follows.

interview-anchor.name: InterviewAnchor
interview-anchor.purpose: Makes knowledge speakable - rehearse explaining the concept
interview-anchor.teacher_description: Prompts learners to rehearse explaining the idea in their own words.

callout-block.name: CalloutBlock
callout-block.purpose: Standalone highlighted callout — tip, warning, info, or exam note
callout-block.teacher_description: Highlighted tip, warning, exam note, or remembered point.

summary-block.name: SummaryBlock
summary-block.purpose: Lists what this section covered — key takeaways as bullets
summary-block.teacher_description: Bullet takeaways that close what the section covered.

section-divider.name: SectionDivider
section-divider.purpose: Named visual break between parts within a section
section-divider.teacher_description: Named visual break between parts within a lesson.

definition-card.name: DefinitionCard
definition-card.purpose: Anchors a formal term with formal and plain versions
definition-card.teacher_description: Introduces a term with formal and everyday language side by side.

definition-family.name: DefinitionFamily
definition-family.purpose: Groups related terms that belong together conceptually
definition-family.teacher_description: Groups related terms that belong together conceptually.

glossary-rail.name: GlossaryRail
glossary-rail.purpose: Vocabulary visible in peripheral field, updates by section
glossary-rail.teacher_description: Sidebar vocabulary that stays visible while reading.
glossary-rail.print_fallback: Inline vocabulary strip at section end

glossary-inline.name: GlossaryInline
glossary-inline.purpose: In-text definition pop-up on a defined term
glossary-inline.teacher_description: Short in-text definition pop-up on a key term.

insight-strip.name: InsightStrip
insight-strip.purpose: Side-by-side comparison of 2-3 related values or concepts
insight-strip.teacher_description: Side-by-side comparison of a few values or ideas.

key-fact.name: KeyFact
key-fact.purpose: Visually prominent stat, formula, or date that anchors the section
key-fact.teacher_description: Prominent stat, formula, or date that anchors the section.

comparison-grid.name: ComparisonGrid
comparison-grid.purpose: Holds multiple concepts in view so distinctions become structural
comparison-grid.teacher_description: Compares concepts across shared criteria in a grid.

worked-example-card.name: WorkedExampleCard
worked-example-card.purpose: Shows reasoning in action step by step, each step justified
worked-example-card.teacher_description: Walks through a problem step by step with clear reasoning.

process-steps.name: ProcessSteps
process-steps.purpose: A repeatable procedure where order is non-negotiable
process-steps.teacher_description: Ordered procedure learners should follow every time.
process-steps.print_fallback: All steps visible, checkbox squares for print

practice-stack.name: PracticeStack
practice-stack.purpose: Problems at calibrated difficulty with progressive hints and optional solutions
practice-stack.teacher_description: Problems at varied difficulty with progressive hints.

quiz-check.name: QuizCheck
quiz-check.purpose: Quick concept check with immediate feedback mid-section
quiz-check.print_fallback: Question and options shown, correct answer marked

reflection-prompt.name: ReflectionPrompt
reflection-prompt.purpose: Pauses forward motion and turns attention inward
reflection-prompt.teacher_description: Open pause that encourages deeper thinking or sharing.

student-textbox.name: StudentTextbox
student-textbox.purpose: Simple write-in box for student responses — no framing beyond a prompt
student-textbox.teacher_description: Simple write-in space tied to a short prompt.

short-answer.name: ShortAnswerQuestion
short-answer.purpose: Open question with write-in space and optional mark scheme
short-answer.teacher_description: Open question with lines for a written response.
short-answer.cognitive_job: Recall and explain in own words
short-answer.print_fallback: Question with lined answer space, mark allocation shown

fill-in-blank.name: FillInTheBlank
fill-in-blank.purpose: Cloze passage with student-completed blanks — tests recall not recognition
fill-in-blank.teacher_description: Cloze passage with blanks for recall, not recognition only.
fill-in-blank.print_fallback: Passage with underlined blanks, word bank box below

pitfall-alert.name: PitfallAlert
pitfall-alert.purpose: Names a specific misconception before the learner makes it
pitfall-alert.teacher_description: Names a misconception and explains the correct idea.

diagram-block.name: DiagramBlock
diagram-block.purpose: Makes spatial or relational structure visible
diagram-block.teacher_description: Labelled visual with optional annotation callouts.

diagram-compare.name: DiagramCompare
diagram-compare.purpose: Before and after comparison with a drag slider
diagram-compare.teacher_description: Compares two diagrams with an interactive or static slider.
diagram-compare.print_fallback: Both diagrams shown side by side

diagram-series.name: DiagramSeries
diagram-series.purpose: A progression of diagrams that tells a sequence
diagram-series.teacher_description: Sequence of diagrams that tells a visual story.
diagram-series.print_fallback: All diagrams in sequence with step labels

video-embed.name: VideoEmbed
video-embed.purpose: Embeds a video with caption and print fallback
video-embed.teacher_description: Embed a YouTube or Vimeo video with a caption.
video-embed.print_fallback: QR code or thumbnail based on setting

image-block.name: ImageBlock
image-block.purpose: Uploaded raster image with caption and layout options
image-block.teacher_description: Photo, screenshot, or illustration from an uploaded image.

timeline-block.name: TimelineBlock
timeline-block.purpose: Turns chronology into a readable instructional spine
timeline-block.teacher_description: Chronological events with summaries along a spine.
timeline-block.cognitive_job: Follow cause and sequence over time

simulation-block.name: SimulationBlock
simulation-block.purpose: Manipulate a variable and discover the concept through observation
simulation-block.teacher_description: Manipulable widget where learners discover by experimenting.
